title: Better Camera
description: Roblox-style camera system for Minecraft with a 3rd person orbit camera and scroll zoom
body:
# Better Camera — Roblox-style Camera System for Minecraft

# **Full rerwrite of mod coming soon**. [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/2myJxynQtX)  or [Telegram](https://t.me/nrzmods) to download updates first!

**Better Camera** is a lightweight, high-performance, client-side Fabric mod that completely reimagines Minecraft's camera physics to match the fluid feel of Roblox. It simplifies standard cycling down to two essential views (First-Person and Third-Person Orbit) while introducing premium features.

### 🌟 Features:
* 🎥 **Orbit Camera**: Pan freely around your character in Third-Person mode without rotating your player model. Player turns to face the walking direction only when moving.
* 🔍 **Seamless Scroll-to-Zoom**: Scroll all the way from First-Person mode out to 15 blocks. Features smooth distance interpolation (smooth zoom).
* 👤 **Smooth Player Fading**: As the camera zooms close to the head, the player body, armor, cape, and features smoothly fade into transparent invisibility for a breathtakingly clean first-person transition.
* 🔒 **Shift Lock (L-CTRL Toggle)**: Shifts the camera over-the-shoulder, locks player body to camera yaw for strafing/combat, and draws a smooth-fading high-fidelity circular cursor.
* ⚙️ **In-Game Settings**: Access the settings in-game via a button in the top-right of your Options screen or by pressing **`K`** at any time. Customize First-Person zoom, Ctrl Lock ability, and turn transitions on/off instantly.
* ⚠️ **Multiplayer Safety**: Prompts a warning screen before entering multiplayer servers, letting you play with Ctrl Lock safely disabled if desired.

**[Join our Telegram!](https://t.me/nrzmods)**
**[Join our Discord!](https://discord.gg/DYENTdNR76)**
